mapper.select: SELECT * FROM schedule JOIN program USING(program_id) JOIN workshop USING(workshop_id) WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule (program_id, start_time, end_time, capacity) VALUES (#{programId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{capacity})
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET start_time=#{startTime}, end_time=#{endTime}, capacity=#{capacity} WHERE schedule_id =#{scheduleId}
UPDATE schedule SET active = false WHERE schedule_id =#{scheduleId}
mapper.select: SELECT current_attendees FROM schedule WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET status = '마감' WHERE start_time <= NOW() OR current_attendees >= capacity
UPDATE schedule SET status = '모집' WHERE capacity > current_attendees AND start_time > NOW() AND status = '마감'
mapper.select: SELECT schedule_id FROM schedule WHERE current_attendees >= capacity
SELECT schedule_id FROM schedule WHERE start_time <= NOW()
